steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank connects two sentences. The first says practical effects are more realistic but prohibitively expensive. The second says filmmakers use a blended approach to control costs. The blank must show that the second sentence is a direct consequence of the cost problem stated in the first.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Similarly,: signals that the second idea parallels or agrees with the first, not that it follows from it as a result. ✗
  • Choice B — For this reason,: signals a cause-and-effect relationship — the blended approach is the response to the cost constraint just described. ✓
  • Choice C — Furthermore,: signals additional supporting information, not a consequence. ✗
  • Choice D — In other words,: signals a restatement of the same idea, but the second sentence introduces new information (the blended approach) rather than restating the first. ✗
That is the correct answer.
